results.title: Oil Market Report - December 2025 – Analysis - IEA
results.snippet: Global oil supply fell by 610 kb/d in November, extending the decline from September’s record of 109 mb/d to 1.5 mb/d. OPEC+ accounted for over three-quarters of the total decrease, led by sanctions-hit Russia and Venezuela.

results.title: Reuters OPEC News | Today's Latest Stories | Reuters
results.snippet: Russian Deputy Prime Minister said on Tuesday that there is currently a balance on the global oil market, while demand will be gradually rising in March and April, when asked about the OPEC+ group's plans on its production policy.

results.title: Oil prices forecast to ease in 2026 under pressure from ample supply | Reuters
results.snippet: (Reuters) - The global oil market is likely to be under pressure in 2026 as growing supply and weak demand curb prices, and traders monitor OPEC+ for policy signals and any attempts to bolster the market, a Reuters poll showed on Monday.
